---
name: 📦 Package Request
about: Request a package to be added to Termux App Store
title: "[REQUEST] "
labels: ["package-request", "needs-review"]
assignees: ["djunekz"]
---

## 📦 Package Information

**Package Name**
<!-- Name of the package you want to add -->

**Package Description**
<!-- Brief description of what this package does -->

**Official Website / Repository**
<!-- Link to the official website or source repository -->
<!-- Example: https://github.com/author/package -->

---

## 📥 Source Information

**Where can this package be downloaded?**
- [ ] GitHub Releases
- [ ] Official website
- [ ] Other (explain below)

**Download URL / Release Page**
<!-- Direct link to download or release page -->

---

## 📱 Compatibility

**Supported Architecture**
- [ ] aarch64 (ARM 64-bit) — most modern Android devices
- [ ] arm (ARM 32-bit)
- [ ] x86_64
- [ ] i686
- [ ] All architectures

**Minimum Android Version**
<!-- Example: Android 7.0+ -->

---

## 🔍 Additional Information

**Why should this package be added?**
<!-- Tell us why this package is useful for Termux users -->

**Is this package actively maintained?**
- [ ] Yes, actively maintained
- [ ] Yes, but infrequent updates
- [ ] No longer maintained (explain why it should still be added)

**Any similar packages already in the store?**
<!-- List any similar packages if you know of any -->

---

## ✅ Checklist

- [ ] I have searched existing issues and this package has not been requested before
- [ ] This package is legal and does not violate any terms of service
- [ ] This package is relevant for Termux users
- [ ] I have provided accurate information above
